articles.author: Seth Borenstein
articles.title: Meteorologists warn week ahead in US will have dangerous temps: 'Heat is not to be played with' - AP News
articles.description: Most of America’s Lower 48 states are about to swelter under an unusually large, strong and long-lasting heat dome. The National Weather Service calls the upcoming heat wave “significant and dangerous.” Meteorologists predict the heat wave will start this wee…
